user.title: Set Up Ezlo HA Cloud
user.description: This integration enables secure remote access to your Home Assistant instance via Ezlo Cloud.

confirm.description: Do you want to start setup?

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration possible.
abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network

login.title: Login to Ezlo Cloud
login.description:
Enter your Ezlo Cloud credentials to enable remote access.

{error_detail}

signup.title: Create an Ezlo Cloud Account
signup.description:
Create a new account to start a **free trial** of Ezlo Cloud remote access.

{error_detail}

subscribe.title: Complete Your Subscription
subscribe.description:
Click the link below to complete checkout in your browser:

[Proceed to checkout]({url})

Your free trial begins immediately after checkout. This page will update automatically once Stripe confirms the payment method.

If this page does not update after a few moments, you can close this dialog and reopen the integration options.

redirecting.title: Complete Payment
redirecting.description:
Click the link below to complete your subscription payment:

[Proceed to payment]({url})

This page will update automatically once payment is confirmed.

abort.logged_out: You have been logged out of Ezlo Cloud. Remote access has been disabled.
abort.stripe_redirect_finished: Checkout flow completed. Your subscription status will update shortly.
abort.stripe_failed: Could not start the checkout flow. Please try again later.
abort.config_unavailable: Could not reach the Ezlo cloud to load checkout configuration. Please try again later.
abort.partner_trial_expired: Your partner trial has expired. Please contact your account manager to extend access.
abort.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
error.signup_failed: Account creation failed. Please try again.
error.stripe_failed: Could not create payment session. Please try again later.
error.network_error: Unable to reach Ezlo Cloud. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
